calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-16-2004 Reset For Jury Trial

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-30-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-30-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Millar, Esq. for Plaintiff; Gen Fujioka, Esq. for defendants.
The parties read into the record a stipulation for contingent entry of judgment in event of breach.
Defendants agree to vacate possession of the lower unit of 1359 Gillman Street, San Francisco, California by 6:00pm on Oct-31-2004. Defendants shall pay $1200 for all rent due by Sep-06-2004. The parties shall conduct a walkthrough of the premises at a mutually agreed time within five days. Plaintiff shall pay $2100, inclusive of defendants' security deposit, to the Asian Law Caucus within five days of surrender of possession of the premises. Plaintiff shall conduct a second inspection walkthrough on 24 hours notice to defendants within 5 days after defendants' surrender of possession.
If defendants fail to vacate as agreed, plaintiff may petition the court for back rent of $8100 and surrender of possession. Defendants shall dismiss pending San Francisco Superior Court action #430633 as well as all Rent Board proceedings against plaintiff.
The parties mutually waive all claims except plaintiff reserves the right to recover damages for intentional damage to the premises by defendants. Attorneys fees and costs are waived by both parties unless there is a breach of the stipulation, in which event the prevailing party may recover only those fees and costs arising from the breach.
The Court accepts and approves the settlement by the parties.
